name: testflow-k6
description: k6 performance and load testing for TestFlow web app

scripts.docker:smoke: docker compose --profile k6 run --rm k6 run scenarios/smoke/api-health.js
scripts.docker:smoke:host: docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/scripts" -w /scripts -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:5050 grafana/k6:1.0.0 run scenarios/smoke/api-health.js
scripts.docker:load: docker compose --profile k6 run --rm -e K6_PROFILE=load k6 run scenarios/load/mixed-traffic.js
scripts.docker:stress: docker compose --profile k6 run --rm -e K6_PROFILE=stress k6 run scenarios/stress/api-breakpoint.js
